description: Fragment (upper left corner) of a letter addressed to the great rabbi (ha-Rav ha-Gadol) Yiṣḥaq b. Shemuel. The sender has enclosed a letter to the Nagid. The rest is very fragmentary, something about waladī and something that begin in the time of Sayyidnā. On verso there is a selection of biblical passages. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: שבר (פינה עליונה שמאלית) של מכתב אל הרב הגדול יצחק בן שמואל; השולח כלל מכתב לנגיד
